size.description: Persistent volume size for Mosquitto data (retained messages).

external.description: Enable external access via LoadBalancer service.

ingress.description: Create a Kubernetes Ingress for the WebSocket listener.

ingressHost.description: Hostname for the Ingress (e.g. mqtt.example.com). Required when ingress is true.

ingressClassName.description: Ingress class name (e.g. "nginx"). Leave empty for cluster default.

ingressTlsSecret.description: Name of the TLS secret for HTTPS termination. Leave empty for HTTP only.

ingressAnnotations.description: Additional annotations for the Ingress (e.g. cert-manager, rate-limiting).

memoryLimit.description: Memory limit for the Mosquitto container.

cpuLimit.description: CPU limit for the Mosquitto container.

users.description: Map of Mosquitto users (username to password).
